title: limonia alternans
intro: Limonia alternans, also known as Neem, is a tropical evergreen tree native to India and Southeast Asia, known for its medicinal properties and uses in herbal medicine. The bark, leaves, and seeds of the Neem tree contain compounds with antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiviral properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Neem include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Neem is commonly prepared as a tea, oil, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of ailments.
